title: Selectivity
text: Home * Search * Selectivity Selectivity gives a whiff of Shannon's Type B search to Shannon's Type A or brute-force . The goal is to search "interesting" and forced branches which are or are likely to become part of the principal variation deeper than nominal, but to reduce uninteresting branches.
